title: Custom enchantment books reimagined
description: Adds custom variations to enchantment books
body:
Adds custom variations to enchantment books

To run this resourcepack you will need to install optifine (or cit resewn), and it will automatically replace all the enchantment books with their "custom" version

Visit my twitter page: https://twitter.com/insanisart

My sketchfab: https://sketchfab.com/insanis_art
